results.title: Power Stage Segment to Dominate Data Center Semiconductor Market by 2029, Driven by AI Demand
results.description: Key market opportunities in the data center semiconductor sector include the dominance of the power stage segment by 2029 due to its role in efficient power delivery for AI workloads. The multi-channel ADC/DAC segment is set for the highest CAGR, fueled by the need for precise monitoring in sophisticated AI infrastructures.
